payload.answer: I couldn’t remember the article because the provided URL fetch failed with a 404 network error. No article content was available to store.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched due to a 404 network error, so no durable source claims can be safely created.

details: Requested to remember article at https://example.com/missing.
Mock fetch result reported: 404 network error.
No memory card was created because the source content was unavailable.

repair_options: Retry if the fetch failure was temporary.
